summary: We are in a critical execution phase, balancing the launch of the 'China Going Global' report in September with the redesign of the knowledge website and prioritization of Asia Star and Intelligent China programs, while resolving email account issues and finalizing vendor selections this week.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the 'China Going Global' report (working title 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'), a joint CKGSB-IE initiative targeting a September launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson events in Singapore. The team must finalize the report structure, translate the bulk of the Chinese report, identify op-ed contributors, and secure industry case studies. Urgent this week: review the new version of the report, submit scoring sheets for overseas social media advertising vendor selection, and create webpages for the Indonesia Emerging Markets program. The knowledge website redesign is progressing, with a decision to combine Joker's and Joseph's designs; specific feedback is due from Joseph, Julie, and others. SEO efforts are focused on ranking for AI, EVs, and smart manufacturing programs, prioritizing Asia Star (Nov) and Intelligent China (Dec) over US partnerships. Additionally, resolve the email account lockout issue by deleting and reconfiguring accounts on all devices. Upcoming: publish the 'Disruptive Timing' news article and promote on social media, and finalize the Indonesia program webpage and copy with Ben's feedback.

meetings.title: 邮箱账号问题排查
meetings.summary: 讨论邮箱账号被锁定的问题，建议删除账号重新登录并更新密码，检查所有设备上的Outlook配置。

meetings.title: Meeting Transcript
meetings.summary: The transcript contains unclear or incomplete speech, possibly in Chinese, but no coherent meeting content is discernible.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: Team reviewed Joker's knowledge website redesign, noting it's similar to current site with improved menu categorization. They discussed combining elements from Joseph's more editorial-style design to show more articles and indices on the homepage.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Meeting
meetings.summary: Discussed SEO strategy to rank for AI, EVs, and smart manufacturing programs in China, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on menu categorization, progress on brochures and videos, social media agency scouting, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and prioritizing Media Minds for social media.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team plans a joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with a main research piece by Professor Leeway, op-eds from leadership, and case studies. Report to launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson event in Singapore mid-September.

decisions.text: 邮箱账号被锁定是由于旧密码在多设备上反复尝试登录导致。
Remove dedicated video section from knowledge website; videos will be dispersed by topic.
Combine elements from Joker's and Joseph's designs for the final knowledge website revamp.
Prioritize Asia Star (Nov) and Intelligent China (Dec) programs over US partnerships.
Include Berkeley program as a third priority for English-language overseas offering.
Shun Tian Shu press release will incorporate the 10 points rather than creating a separate article.
Media Minds is preferred as social media agency due to budget constraints and time sensitivity.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, distributed through both schools' channels.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Report to be ready by early September for launch at Singapore events (Tech in Asia or Tyson).
Report will include main research by Professor Leeway, op-eds from leadership, and industry case studies.
Use the new version of the 'China Going Global' report for review.
Proceed with the new program title for Indonesia program.
